summary: Tested InLegalBERT semantic search integration for similar cases and related laws. BERT integration is working correctly - analysis for case f206d7c2-19d9-45f6-8be8-d338180ea869 shows 5 BERT-sourced similar cases and 5 BERT-sourced related laws with proper similarity scores. Advocate parsing bug fix verified. Some intermittent 502 gateway errors observed during testing.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 Bad Gateway errors during testing - appears to be infrastructure/gateway issue, not code issue

critical_code_review_comments: InLegalBERT integration correctly implemented in server.py lines 1214-1253
BERT service properly initializes and generates 768-dimension embeddings
Cosine similarity calculation working correctly (scores range 0.38-1.0)
MongoDB integration for get_similar_cases_with_bert and get_related_laws_with_bert working
Results properly merged with LLM results with 'bert_semantic_search' source tag
Advocate parsing bug fix verified - isinstance(a, dict) check on lines 320-321 works correctly

success_rate.backend: 76% (13/17 tests passed - 4 failures due to intermittent 502 gateway errors and mocked endpoint timeout)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_BERT_State v. Kumar case for BERT analysis testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: InLegalBERT integration is fully functional. Analysis for case f206d7c2-19d9-45f6-8be8-d338180ea869 shows: 9 total similar cases (4 from LLM, 5 from BERT), 11 total relevant laws (6 from LLM, 5 from BERT). BERT results have similarity_score field and source='bert_semantic_search' tag. Mocked CNR endpoint DLHC010127602024 has 10s delay - use 60s timeout for testing. Advocate parsing bug fix verified working.
features_verified: InLegalBERT service initializes and loads law-ai/InLegalBERT model
BERT generates 768-dimension embeddings for case descriptions
get_similar_cases_with_bert() queries MongoDB cases collection and returns top 5 similar cases
get_related_laws_with_bert() queries MongoDB laws collection and returns top 5 related laws
Cosine similarity scores calculated correctly (0.0-1.0 range)
BERT results merged with LLM results in council analysis
Advocate parsing bug fix - isinstance check handles dict and string advocates
MongoDB _id excluded from all API responses
Council analysis completes with all 4 members + chief justice
mocked_api_note: CNR DLHC010127602024 returns mocked eCourts data with 10s delay to simulate API call
